status: audit boundary only; current decoder is variable-shape reference code
variable_shape_surfaces: Vec growth and truncate in path pruning
branching on frozen_mask and candidate bit expansion
floating-point path metrics and total_cmp ordering
recursive SCL node composition with data-dependent path contents
fixed_schedule_requirements: fixed-list array layout for all paths
no secret-dependent allocation, sorting, truncation, or branch pruning
generated-code and timing/leakage audit before any production claim
metric_domain_assumptions: negative metric deltas are diagnostic-only in source-level rail tests
future active integer SCL rail requires fixed-width non-negative penalties before decoder wiring
forbidden sentinel must remain terminal under parent-metric addition

public_path_domain_failure_codes.name: empty_schedule
public_path_domain_failure_codes.meaning: round schedule must contain at least one public round

public_path_domain_failure_codes.name: first_child_capacity
public_path_domain_failure_codes.meaning: first child buffer must hold two children per parent slot

public_path_domain_failure_codes.name: repeated_child_capacity
public_path_domain_failure_codes.meaning: repeated child buffer must hold two children per compacted path

public_path_domain_failure_codes.name: top_l_width
public_path_domain_failure_codes.meaning: list size must fit the parent and child selection widths

public_path_domain_failure_codes.name: bit_index
public_path_domain_failure_codes.meaning: every public bit index must be inside the path bit width

public_child_write_failure_codes.name: parent_slot
public_child_write_failure_codes.meaning: parent slot must be inside the fixed parent buffer

public_child_write_failure_codes.name: dst_capacity
public_child_write_failure_codes.meaning: destination child buffer must have room for both children

public_child_write_failure_codes.name: bit_index
public_child_write_failure_codes.meaning: public bit index must be inside the path bit width

integer_schedule_domain_failure_codes.name: hard_bit
integer_schedule_domain_failure_codes.meaning: hard decisions must be public bits

integer_schedule_domain_failure_codes.name: magnitude
integer_schedule_domain_failure_codes.meaning: integer metric magnitudes must be non-negative

prototype_building_blocks: fixed_schedule_top_l_i64: source-level fixed schedule only; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending
FixedSclPathBuffer: fixed-capacity source-level slot buffer only; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending

fixed_scl_binary_child_write_domain_check: public child-write domain validator for parent slot, destination capacity, and bit index before fixed-slot writes; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending
try_write_binary_children_from: non-panicking child-write wrapper that skips fixed-slot writes on invalid public inputs; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending
write_binary_children_from: integer child expansion into fixed slots only; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending
expand_then_compact_one_bit: one-bit expand then compact source-level prototype only; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending
try_expand_then_compact_one_bit: non-panicking one-bit expand then compact wrapper that returns public path-domain status; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending
expand_then_compact_two_public_bits: two-round public-bit loop source-level prototype only; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending
try_expand_then_compact_two_public_bits: non-panicking two-round public-bit helper that delegates to public schedule domain checks; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending
FixedSclRound + expand_then_compact_public_rounds: public round schedule source-level prototype only; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending
try_expand_then_compact_public_rounds: non-panicking multi-round public schedule wrapper that returns public path-domain status; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending
fixed_scl_public_round_work_counts: public work-count audit for fixed SCL schedule parameters only; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending
fixed_scl_integer_metric_deltas: integer metric delta audit for hard-bit penalties and frozen branch forbidding only; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending
fixed_scl_integer_round_schedule: public integer round schedule audit from hard-bit penalties into FixedSclRound arrays only; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending

fixed_scl_integer_schedule_domain_check: active integer schedule domain validator for hard-bit and non-negative magnitude inputs only; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending

try_fixed_scl_integer_round_schedule: non-panicking integer schedule builder that returns domain-check status before FixedSclRound arrays; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending
fixed_scl_path_buffer_schedule_domain_check: public path-buffer shape validator for capacities and bit indices before expansion; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending

try_expand_then_compact_integer_round_schedule: non-panicking path-buffer schedule wrapper that skips expansion on invalid integer inputs; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending
expand_then_compact_integer_round_schedule: integer schedule source-level loop over fixed path buffers only; not wired into decode_scl; generated-code and timing audit pending
required_action: fixed-schedule integer decoder plan required before replacing ct-003
adjudication: engineering audit artifact only; no production CT claim, no security claim, OPEN = LSN
